title: DNS resolution failing for a client

steps.title: Confirm scope
steps.detail: Test domain from 2+ networks (mobile data, dnschecker.org). Check sister sites at the same registrar.

steps.title: Inspect provider
steps.detail: Open Cloudflare → DNS. Confirm A / CNAME records match expected. Check for recent changes.

steps.title: Check registrar nameservers
steps.detail: Verify nameservers at registrar still point at Cloudflare (or expected DNS host).

steps.title: Notify client
steps.detail: Send templated incident message; set incident state to investigating.

steps.title: Resolve + postmortem
steps.detail: After fix, advance incident to resolved, then write postmortem within 24h.

steps.title: Read build log
steps.detail: Open Netlify deploy → Deploy log. Look for first error line.

steps.title: Reproduce locally
steps.detail: Pull branch, npm install, npm run build.

steps.title: Lockfile drift?
steps.detail: If error mentions missing module, regenerate lockfile and commit.

steps.title: Roll back if blocking prod
steps.detail: Netlify → Deploys → Publish previous successful deploy.

title: Domain or SSL within 60 days of expiry

steps.title: Confirm registrar auto-renew
steps.detail: If on Porkbun/Namecheap, verify auto-renew is ON and payment method valid.

steps.title: Notify client (if billed-back)
steps.detail: Send renewal-confirmation email per contract terms.

steps.title: Update record
steps.detail: After renewal, update domainExpiry / sslExpiry fields on the project.

steps.title: Update vault
steps.detail: Update 1Password / Bitwarden item; bump version note.

steps.title: Roll in services
steps.detail: Update env vars in Netlify / GitHub Actions / runtime.

steps.title: Audit
steps.detail: Log rotation in Aperix Admin → automatic via reveal action.
